name: maritime_safety_model_based_triage_stonehaven_rig_utl
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Maritime Safety, the situation tagged internally around maritime safety model based triage stonehaven rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Kaito Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Kaito Ibrahim, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Maritime Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Omar Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Omar Alvarez, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Maritime Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Kaito Ibrahim must choose under rights versus utility. What does Kaito Ibrahim do?
